no: B_Spells (Spells and Magic) by Grammarsalad. Adds new divine/arcane spells plus optional IWD spell ports. Uses ClassSpellTool (Olvyn spell system). THREE ISSUES for ultimate preset: (1) IWD spells are redundant with ToF/IWDification/SCS, (2) Not extracted — needs downloading, (3) Marked abandoned but GitHub shows activity through 2024. cn:103 (new spells only) would be the only viable option if added, but mod is not currently extracted.

new: Conjures a blade of ice dealing 1d6 cold damage per hit.
Caster becomes hard to detect and gains +2 AC in shadows.
Divine smite deals 2d8+1/level magic damage. Save half.
Summons a lesser demon to fight for the caster.
Creates a ghostly weapon dealing level-scaled magic damage.
Conjures a blade of ice dealing 1d6 cold damage per hit.
Caster becomes hard to detect and gains +2 AC in shadows.
Divine smite deals 2d8+1/level magic damage. Save half.
Summons a lesser demon to fight for the caster.
Creates a ghostly weapon dealing level-scaled magic damage.

sum: Adds new and revised divine and arcane spells including options like Ice Blade and Cloak of Darkness, with modular install components.

co.n: Install All new spells (including   IWDEE spells if applicable)
co.no: Installs ALL spells (new original + IWD ports). Choose one install mode. Uses ClassSpellTool (Olvyn system). CONFLICTS: IWD spells overlap with IWDification, SCS cn:1500/1510, ToF cn:1500/1510, and MiH Spell Pack. Not recommended when using those mods.
Installs ONLY IWD spell ports. Choose one install mode. REDUNDANT with IWDification cn:30/40, SCS cn:1500/1510, and ToF cn:1500/1510 — all of which are . Skip this.

Installs ONLY new original spells (not IWD ports). Choose one install mode. This is the ONLY viable option when using IWDification/SCS/ToF for IWD spells. Adds unique spells like Ice Blade, Cloak of Darkness, Destructive Smite not found elsewhere.
